catalysts.title: What another sales decline for Target says about consumers - Star Tribune
catalysts.description: Target’s comparable sales fell 2.5% and profits more than 5%, while competitors saw gains and Best Buy had a steady holiday quarter.

catalysts.title: ChatGPT Health 'under-triaged' half of medical emergencies in a new study - NBC News
catalysts.description: ChatGPT Health — OpenAI’s new health-focused chatbot — frequently underestimated the severity of medical emergencies, according to a study published last week in the journal Nature Medicine

catalysts.title: Paramount Skydance Debt Downgraded to Junk Status by Fitch Ratings Following Warner Bros. Discovery Deal - Variety
catalysts.description: Fitch Ratings downgraded Paramount Skydance's credit rating and debt to junk status in the wake of the deal to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery.

catalysts.title: Quantum firms set up across Chicago ahead of South Works campus - Crain's Chicago Business
catalysts.description: Companies slated for the Illinois Quantum & Microelectronics Park are opening labs at mHUB, Hyde Park Labs and downtown while the South Works campus is built.

catalysts.title: Anthropic’s Claude is suddenly the most popular iPhone app following Pentagon feud - CNN
catalysts.description: The AI company Anthropic was likely not in the public lexicon just a month ago. But it is now after a whirlwind sequence of events in February thrust the company into the public eye more than ever.

catalysts.title: Global Bonds on Knife-Edge as Iran War Revives Inflation Threat - Bloomberg.com
catalysts.description: The US-Israeli war on Iran is rekindling inflation concerns across financial markets, sapping the outlook for global bonds that had just posted their best start to a year since the pandemic.

catalysts.title: The candy heir vs. chocolate skimpflation : Planet Money - NPR
catalysts.description: The grandson of the Reese's Peanut Butter Cups creator has launched a campaign against The Hershey Company, which owns the Reese's brand. He wants them to stop skimping on ingredients.

catalysts.title: Laid off by Block, reunited on Slack: Inside the 3,800-person 'Square Mafia' - Business Insider
catalysts.description: Former Block employees congregate in an unaffiliated Slack group to share support, find new jobs, and trade memes. It's grown since recent layoffs.
